overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dense pine forest, passing a wooden hut, and emerging onto an open grassy hillside with panoramic views of a distant valley. The character moves steadily through varying terrain from enclosed woodland to open ridge.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense forest undergrowth between tall pine trees

entered.detail: tall coniferous trees forming a dense canopy overhead
thick ferns and shrubs covering the forest floor
grassy ground with patches of dirt and fallen needles

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense, enclosed pine forest with limited sky visibility. The lighting is diffused through the canopy, and the ground is covered with grass and undergrowth. No other characters or structures are visible in this secluded woodland area.

events.description: a rustic wooden hut becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden hut at the forest edge while transitioning toward open terrain

entered.detail: small rustic log cabin with dark wooden walls partially hidden by trees
grassy clearing at the edge of the dense woods

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the deep forest to a more open edge area where a wooden hut stands among the trees. The sky becomes partially visible, and the lighting shifts to a mix of shade and sunlight. The dense undergrowth gives way to clearer grassy ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with valley overlook

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy ridge with panoramic views of the valley below

entered.detail: open grassy slope with tall green grass and wildflowers
expansive view of a wide valley with distant forests and settlements
small settlement with buildings visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide-open grassy hillside with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The terrain offers panoramic views of a distant valley and village below. The forest trees now line the left side while the right side opens to the expansive landscape.

events.description: character steps onto a well-trodden dirt path winding along the ridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path while maintaining views of the valley to the right

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the grass along the hillside
tall wooden post with directional markers beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from walking on pure grass to following a defined dirt path along the ridge. A wooden signpost appears beside the trail, suggesting a marked route. The valley views remain visible to the right as the path winds forward through the open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a secluded pine forest into a wide, sunlit highland landscape. It begins within a dense, enclosed woodland where diffused light filters through a heavy canopy over grass and undergrowth. As the character moves forward, the forest thins to reveal a wooden hut nestled among the trees, shifting the lighting into a mix of shade and bright patches. The scene then opens completely onto a wide grassy hillside under direct sunlight, offering panoramic views of a distant valley and village. Finally, the terrain transitions from open grass to a defined dirt path along the ridge, passing a wooden signpost as the camera continues forward.
